objective: Make LifeMax feel more like a credible private operating loop by letting a completed local day become browser-local history that persists, appears in Profile/export, and is visible on deployed public aliases without backend claims.
approvalStatus: Production promotion was explicitly approved earlier in this goal thread with PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote; this slice made no credential, auth, DNS, backend service, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, or destructive changes.
preActionEvidence: Public repo was clean at 38ba201 before the feature branch work in /Users/oliverrussell/Desktop/LifeMax-vercel-ready.
Fresh LifeMax lab preflight was red at 2026-06-20T08:16:56.605Z, with local MCP health unknown and get_life_safety_state/get_grok_context_brief not loaded.
Fresh LifeMax boot packet was red at 2026-06-20T08:16:56.703Z, with safe_to_claim_daily_usable=false.
The prior public app had many single-day local workflows, but no persistent day-history checkpoint proving the day could become a higher-level local record.
postActionEvidence: Added LocalDayArchive state, normalization, export summary count, day-history derivation, and createDayArchive helper.
Patterns can save a ready local day review into browser-local history without resetting data or claiming backend storage.
Profile shows Local day history and export preview includes day_archives plus the archived tomorrow cue.
Feature commit 53bad3b was pushed to origin/main.
lifemax-web production deploy dpl_CriNYsrkGNUkBudytZZyBTYb1uoK reached READY.
life-max-omega production alias resolved to READY deployment dpl_3Ycxk19iSEpng2CFA2aUJpXmWtMQ after Git/Vercel integration.
Live smoke on both public aliases saved check-in, plan, capture, close, review, archived the day, refreshed, verified Profile/export, and observed no runtime errors or mobile overflow.
Independent verifier 019ee424-454b-75e3-92f7-908a1b539433 returned CHECKPOINT_OK and COMPLETE_OK=false.

npm run test:fixtures pass: 1 file, 2 tests
npm run test:pwa pass: 1 file, 1 test
npm run screenshot:mobile pass: build plus 2 Playwright tests
changed-file diff scan for secret-shaped values pass
in-app browser local /patterns inspection pass: Local day history and Freshness sections present, 1280/1280 width, no console errors
live Playwright smoke pass on https://life-max-omega.vercel.app and https://lifemax-web.vercel.app for day-history archive persistence and export propagation
quality_verifier 019ee424-454b-75e3-92f7-908a1b539433 pass for checkpoint, not complete

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Initial live smoke script mixed CommonJS require with top-level await under Node 25.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Reran the smoke as an ESM script with import statements.
defects_found_and_repaired.rerun: Live deployed smoke passed on both aliases.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: The first visual-smoke history assertion matched both the history summary and archive row tomorrow cue.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Scoped the assertion to .history-item with exact text.

playwright.flow: Save review checkpoint, archive day, refresh, verify Local day history persists, verify Profile summary and export preview include day_archives.

deployment.approval: PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote was provided earlier in this goal thread.
deployment.deployment_id_note: Deployment IDs are point-in-time details. The public aliases are the user-facing proof targets.

residualRisks: This slice is browser-local only and does not prove WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, backend writes, reminders, or cross-device sync.
LifeMax lab boot/preflight remains red, so the broader daily shared-context goal is not complete.
The new history archive does not create multi-day analytics or trend scoring beyond a local checkpoint list.
rollbackPath: Revert or redeploy the previous public app commit 38ba201 if the local day-history archive regresses; no credentials, auth settings, DNS, custom-domain settings, or backend services were changed by this slice.
stop_continue_decision: checkpoint, not complete: day history product code is pushed/deployed/smoked on both public aliases; shared-context/Wave 1 readiness remains red and unproved.

notes: Verifier independently inspected current repo state, proof packet, screenshots, Vercel alias readiness, and lab boot/preflight evidence.
Verifier accepted the Day History checkpoint and rejected COMPLETE_OK for the broader goal because LifeMax lab boot/preflight remains red.
Verifier flagged stale proof-index fields, which this proof refresh corrects before final proof commit.
